heading: Commissioned officers: reserve grade of adjutants general and assistant adjutants general
label: 12215 Commissioned officers: reserve grade of adjutants general and assistant adjutants general
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in sections 3392 and 8392 of this title, prior to repeal by , (c)(1).Pub. L. 103–337, § 1629(a)(1)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: The adjutant general or an assistant adjutant general of the Army National Guard of a State may, upon being extended Federal recognition, be appointed as a reserve officer of the Army as of the date on which he is so recognized.

children.label: b
children.text: The adjutant general or an assistant adjutant general of the Air National Guard of a State may be appointed in the reserve commissioned grade in which Federal recognition in the Air National Guard is extended to him.
